hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.loads(sys.stdin.read()).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'push\s+--force|push\s+-f\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: git push --force is not allowed on this project.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
